title: AST SpaceMobile to Post Q4 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
text: AST SpaceMobile is anticipated to report improved top-line results year-over-year, driven by momentum across government and commercial sectors. The consensus estimates $3 million in total revenues for Q4 2024, compared to no revenue in the same quarter last year. For earnings per share, analysts expect a loss of 15 cents, an improvement from the 35-cent loss reported in Q4 2023. Key positive developments include the deployment of five BlueBird commercial satellites during the quarter, described as the largest commercial communications arrays to be sent into low Earth orbit. Recent partnerships include agreements with Vodafone extending through 2034 and collaborations with AT&T and Verizon for space-based cellular broadband services. The Space Development Agency selected ASTS for prototype demonstration projects, and the company partnered with Cadence Design Systems to enhance satellite technology capabilities. Despite positive business developments, the article notes that the model does not conclusively predict an earnings beat for this reporting period.
